replies.msg:
係XFASTEST見到個水冷List 幾吸引

CPU: Intel Core i7-8700K 6 Core 12 Thread 3.7GHz (Up to 4.7GHz)
Motherboard: ASUS ROG STRIX Z370-E GAMING Motherboard
RAM: ADATA XPG SPECTRIX D80 32G Kit 3000Mhz (8GB x 4) RAM
Display Card: ASUS ROG STRIX RTX2080 O8G GAMING
SSD: ADATA XPG SX8200 480GB NVMe M.2 SSD, PCIe Gen3 x4
HDD: Seagate Ironwolf 6TB, 7x24 7200rpm 256MB Cache
Network Card: QNAP QXG-10G1T 10 Gigabit Network Card
Power Supply: Corsair HX750 750W 80Plus Platinum Power Supply Unit
Water Cooling: XFastest Tailor Made Water Cooling System with Installation Service
水冷液: 3M Fluorinert Electronic Liquid FC-3283 不導電工程液
Windows: Microsoft Windows 10 Pro 64Bit 繁體中文/English, OEM上埋 Version
Case: Lian Li PC-O11 Dynamic
Total: $31,888
Source: https://hk.xfastest.com/shop/alpha/

現況: 呢排玩開Apex、Rainbow Six、OW，唔剪片唔直播，用緊1080p 144Hz mon，本身有個4k 60Hz mon，打算遲啲新腦用1080p@144、舊腦用4k@60。
個人需求: 主要係想特效全開穩定144fps，對ASUS有種信仰，揀水冷純粹覺得部腦夠型同埋未試過。
另外，如果轉i9-9900k同RTX 2080 Ti會唔會太貴?

想請教下各位巴打XFASTEST或者條List有冇伏，同埋有冇其他注意地方或者改進空間，有咩講得唔清楚或者講漏會後補
Sorry啲字細隻左🙇🏻‍♂️

水魚錢係幾好賺

仲有 水冷人工包料洗撚要皮幾野

3皮野9900k+2080ti啦

正式黎講靚既水冷system for memory
係應該換埋條ram塊heatsink再落冷頭，再駁喉等佢有個waterloop可以幫條ram散熱



誇張d講可以話依條ram同普通ram無分別
